{{Quote|I sent the little stowaway to you hours ago in the company of two Droids.|Zornog|<ref name="Droids (1986) 4">[[Droids (1986) 4|''Droids'' (1986) 4]]</ref>}}
'''Zornog''' was the [[Sooman]] [[King/Legends|King]] of [[Sooma]].

==Biography==
When [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sludd]] tried to usurp the throne of nearby [[Alzar]], he tricked [[Alzarian/Legends|Alzarian]] heir [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Plooz]] into running away to Sooma on a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], where the child met Zornog. Plooz was rescued by [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

{{Char-stub}}
